raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> I got scammed by a company named XXXX XXXX for the amount of {$390.00}. The rep that handled the situation is named XXXX XXXX. This scam of a company claimed to be XXXX XXXX I was dealing with dealing and XXXX XXXX children who were not able to travel that day. I called what I thought was XXXX XXXX asking for my options on not losing the tickets. They claim if I pay the amount I would be reimbursed for the tickets minus the {$390.00}. The call became suspicious and once I questioned it they hung up on me. I since then found the correct info for XXXX XXXX  and they mentioned they dont operate in that way and would never charge a fee for a canceled flight. I used my American Express card which I filed a claim with and also led me to file a complaint for the refund of the scam for their were no services rendered and I was tricked.
